title: clear netherrack
description: periodically removes all Netherrack items in the Nether.
body:
Periodically kills all Netherrack items on the ground in the Nether to help drastically improve performance when netherite mining etc.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ylQg0h2j/images/b0764af215f4d7dac905296d0e1e4050cfa5f696.png)
